new_tasks.title: Non-clinical pay uplift -- coordinate Oxford input
new_tasks.description: Jasmin Khokhra has sent a kick-off email for the non-clinical pay uplift project. With main holiday season approaching and calendars filling up fast, Kevin needs to review the requirements and coordinate Oxford's input on pay configuration impacts in PeopleXD.

new_tasks.title: DTP1334 SHSMS Evaluation -- review Christopher Sanders legal compliance requirements
new_tasks.description: Christopher Sanders has sent a follow-up email from yesterday's evaluation session with a list of legal compliance requirements split by system. Kevin needs to review these and incorporate into the broader POC evaluation work.
